strengths: Distributed systems experience at real scale — Sociomantic microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency DLang and async I/O demonstrates genuine backend depth
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing current hands-on engagement with agentic workflows
Broad polyglot technical range (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Node, mobile, embedded) with a consistent TDD and software-craftsmanship discipline across roles
concerns: No evidence of people management or engineering leadership — every role carries an individual-contributor title (Senior/Staff Developer) with no reports, no team scaling, and no hiring ownership
Fintech exposure is shallow: RIDE Capital and Optilyz were IC contributor roles on product features, not architectural leadership over credit systems, payment flows, or regulatory compliance

Agentic AI experience is very recent (April 2025, ~2 months) and contributor-scoped; the role demands demonstrated production multi-agent system design and operation, not early-stage tooling contributions
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong individual contributor with real distributed-systems credibility and emerging agentic tooling exposure, but the resume reveals no evidence of the executive-level capabilities this role requires: he has never managed a team, scaled an engineering organization, owned architectural domains at a company level, or operated AI systems in regulated financial environments. The gap between his current trajectory (Staff IC) and the CTO mandate (executive leadership, compliance, multi-agent production systems at fintech scale) is too wide to bridge with the evidence presented.
